column1: Russian nesting dolls are more popular with children than adults.
The man who cut and carved the wood also painted them.
Savva Mamontov and his wife were artists.
The dolls became popular around the world before they won a prize.
Sergey and Vasily used a Japanese doll for inspiration.
The doll sets look like famous people are the most popular these days.
Some people incorrectly call them babushka dolls.
Sergey and Vasily also designed furniture together.
